entity.summary: Philippines-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Coins.ph brand.

events.title: Coins.ph launched
events.description: Coins.ph launched in the Philippines in January 2014 as a cryptocurrency and exchange platform.
events.notes: Month-level launch marker based on the official about page.

evidence.title: About Coins.ph
evidence.notes: Official about page states that Coins.ph launched in 2014 and lists January 2014 as its founding month.

evidence.title: What is Coins.ph and how does it work?
evidence.notes: Official help-center article corroborates the 2014 launch and current exchange functionality.
